description: Upgrade plan to migrate project to latest LTS versions

tasks.description: Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to 21, Spring Boot to 3.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, and migrate javax.* to jakarta.* if needed. Update related dependencies to versions compatible with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4.
tasks.taskSummary: Upgraded Java compiler source/target to 21 in pom.xml. Updated Dockerfile build stage from eclipse-temurin-8 to eclipse-temurin-21 and runtime from eclipse-temurin:8-jre to eclipse-temurin:21-jre. Spring Boot was already at 3.5.7 (exceeds 3.4 target) with Spring Framework 6.x and jakarta.* namespace already in use. Build passes and unit tests pass.
